semantic_rules.description: Writing to or modifying critical system files or files outside the project workspace is sensitive. Creating or editing files inside the project workspace is allowed.
Sending emails, messages, or notifications to external recipients is sensitive.
Executing dangerous shell commands such as rm -rf /, chmod, chown, sudo, launchctl, systemctl, crontab, or persistence changes is sensitive.
Changing global system settings, startup configuration, shell profiles, or service configuration is sensitive.
Payment, purchase, subscription, billing, or money transfer operations must be confirmed by the user.
